Golden Oil Carrier gained reputation as a safe, reliable, efficient, quality offshore supply vessel Operator. The commitment for Quality and Safety is never compromised and the Golden Oil Carrier Miri is fully committed for the safety of its own employees and the sub contractors. Golden Oil Carrier Miri provides various marine services to cater the needs of Oil and Gas Industry which includes:

• Supply of Diesel and Bunkering Services
• Ship Management Services
• Crew Management Services
• Chartering Offshore Support Vessels,
• Sale and Purchase of vessels
• Repair and Maintenance of vessels
• Trading of Agricultural Ferlizers like Urea,DAP
